title: Niko Oneshot pack
description: Resoursepack that makes cats named "Niko" change their skin to niko from Oneshot
body: Resourse pack that makes all cats named "Niko" change their skin to niko from Oneshot. Requiers optifine for resourse pack to work properly! I accept any suggestions y'all have in my dm's(discord) my nickname: "mr.shadow_bonnie"
